text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're having a meeting to review today's
training, when...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Weeell, I wouldn't say that my training has been
bad lately, but...
choice_data_list: Is there something on your mind?
Is there something on your mind?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I'm right on the verge of a
breakthrough, but I can't quite get there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's body suddenly goes limp as she
says this...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! Where... am I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooosh...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What in the world?! A track?! I don't know what's
happening...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And they're into the stretch! It's still Special Week
in the lead!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: How is this possible?! I'm almost at the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Will Special Week be able to display her prowess
all the way to the finish with her rivals pursuing
her?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Geez! If you say stuff like that, I'm gonna have to
keep running!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the winner is Special Week! She gets the job
done, and the crowd can go home happy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I wonder what race that was...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I don't really get what's going on, but that was
fun.The feeling of having the finish line in sight...
Oh!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's it! I finally know the answer to what's been
bugging me for so long!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooosh...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa, everything's gone back to normal!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Anyway, just listen to me! I had an epiphany!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I finally figured out when I should make my last
spurt to the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how it happened. Maybe it's just
because it's been bothering me for so long...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I feel like my training is gonna go better than
ever from now on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The epiphany seems to have unlocked some of
the potential hidden inside of Special Week.
